'''ngahofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zealot|zealot]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zealot|zealot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngahofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæhefeth|ngæhefeth]] || [[word:ngæhefej|ngæhefej]] || [[word:ngæhefesh|ngæhefesh]] || [[word:ngæhefe|ngæhefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngahohofoth|ngahohofoth]] || [[word:ngahohofoj|ngahohofoj]] || [[word:ngahohofosh|ngahohofosh]] || [[word:ngahohofo|ngahohofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngahofoth|ngahofoth]] || [[word:ngahofoj|ngahofoj]] || [[word:ngahofosh|ngahofosh]] || [[word:ngahofo|ngahofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngahoffoth|ngahoffoth]] || [[word:ngahoffoj|ngahoffoj]] || [[word:ngahoffosh|ngahoffosh]] || [[word:ngahoffof|ngahoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngahofotho|ngahofotho]] || [[word:ngahofojo|ngahofojo]] || [[word:ngahofosho|ngahofosho]] || [[word:ngahofoko|ngahofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngahofoth|ngahofoth]] || [[word:ngahofoj|ngahofoj]] || [[word:ngahofosh|ngahofosh]] || [[word:ngahofo|ngahofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngahofothol|ngahofothol]] || [[word:ngahofojol|ngahofojol]] || [[word:ngahofoshol|ngahofoshol]] || [[word:ngahofokol|ngahofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngahofothotho|ngahofothotho]] || [[word:ngahofojojo|ngahofojojo]] || [[word:ngahofoshosho|ngahofoshosho]] || [[word:ngahofoko|ngahofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngahofothon|ngahofothon]] || [[word:ngahofojon|ngahofojon]] || [[word:ngahofoshon|ngahofoshon]] || [[word:ngahofokon|ngahofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngahofothoro|ngahofothoro]] || [[word:ngahofojoro|ngahofojoro]] || [[word:ngahofoshoro|ngahofoshoro]] || [[word:ngahofokoro|ngahofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
